reviews.review_description: The movements has to be fixed but the story is sigma with sigma monsters and sigma screamers and sigma joshy owner im the first player of the game to not be a moderator and a sigma experience

We are working on the movement trust me.

reviews.review_description: Honestly the movement isn’t great right now but they are fixing it and adding more stuff to the game the owners worked really hard an made a masterpiece this game is so good

developer_response.body:
We are working on the movement :)

Glad u like the game!

reviews.review_description: The game is very scary and I love how this game using gorilla locomotion and the monster goes after you by noise that is awesome!!!
Its a w game i like the horror it pretty scary but fun at the same time 5 stars
